title: Lodhran Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Lodhran, with a Z-Score of +6.23. This critical event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Lodhran is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 20.8 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 28%, and the wind speed is 8.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no cooling degree days, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
